languages.text: "Скверно". {n}Ее брови сходятся у переносицы.{/n} "Скверно, что пока нам приходится рассчитывать лишь на силы Драйвстемов. Судя по тем жалким сведениям, которыми вы располагаете, войска вели не вы. Но судьба подкрепления и ваших родичей должна занимать вас не меньше моего. Отыщите любые зацепки: осмотрите заставу, расспросите {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}. Скажу прямо: сейчас ваша польза для нас важнее оправданий."

traits.locale_text: "Скверно". {n}Ее брови сходятся у переносицы.{/n} "Скверно, что пока нам приходится рассчитывать лишь на силы Драйвстемов. Судя по тем жалким сведениям, которыми вы располагаете, войска вели не вы. Но судьба подкрепления и ваших родичей должна занимать вас не меньше моего. Отыщите любые зацепки: осмотрите заставу, расспросите {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}. Скажу прямо: сейчас ваша польза для нас важнее оправданий."

languages.text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

languages.text: “那可真是不妙。”{n}她蹙起眉头，双眉紧锁。{/n}“不妙的是，我们至今还要仰仗德莱夫斯塔家的兵力。根据你那点可怜的情报来看，我猜你并非领兵之人。但你应该跟我一样，都很关心那支援军和你族人的下落吧？去找找线索，搜查一下前哨，再问问那些{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}。我就直说了，眼下比起找借口，你更应该做点有用的事。”
languages.original_text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

traits.locale_text: “那可真是不妙。”{n}她蹙起眉头，双眉紧锁。{/n}“不妙的是，我们至今还要仰仗德莱夫斯塔家的兵力。根据你那点可怜的情报来看，我猜你并非领兵之人。但你应该跟我一样，都很关心那支援军和你族人的下落吧？去找找线索，搜查一下前哨，再问问那些{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}。我就直说了，眼下比起找借口，你更应该做点有用的事。”

languages.text: {n}Ses sourcils se rejoignent alors qu'elle se renfrogne.{/n} « Voilà qui est fâcheux. Et ce d'autant plus que, jusqu'à présent, nous avons été contraints de nous en remettre aux forces des Drivestem. À en juger par le peu d'informations en votre possession, je présume que vous n'étiez pas à la tête des troupes. Pour autant, le sort des renforts et de vos proches devrait vous préoccuper tout autant que moi. Menez l'enquête, cherchez des indices à l'avant-poste et interrogez les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g}. Pour être bien claire, dans l'immédiat, vous rendre utile est plus important que de vous répandre en excuses. »
languages.original_text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ses sourcils se rejoignent alors qu'elle se renfrogne.{/n} « Voilà qui est fâcheux. Et ce d'autant plus que, jusqu'à présent, nous avons été contraints de nous en remettre aux forces des Drivestem. À en juger par le peu d'informations en votre possession, je présume que vous n'étiez pas à la tête des troupes. Pour autant, le sort des renforts et de vos proches devrait vous préoccuper tout autant que moi. Menez l'enquête, cherchez des indices à l'avant-poste et interrogez les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g}. Pour être bien claire, dans l'immédiat, vous rendre utile est plus important que de vous répandre en excuses. »

languages.text: "Büyük talihsizlik." {n}Çatılan kaşları ortada birleşiyor.{/n} "Şimdiye kadar Drivestemlerin gücüne bel bağlamak zorunda kalmamız da büyük talihsizlik. Verdiğiniz cılız bilgilerden yola çıkarak birlikleri komuta edenin siz olmadığınızı varsayıyorum. Ancak takviyelerin ve akrabalarınızın akıbeti, beni ilgilendirdiği kadar sizi de ilgilendirmeli. İpuçları bulmaya çalışın: Karakola bakın, olan biteni de {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovlulara{/g} sorun. lafı dolandırmayacağım. Şu anda bahane üretip durmak yerine bir işe yaramanız gerek."
languages.original_text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

Verdiğiniz cılız bilgilerden yola çıkarak birlikleri komuta edenin siz olmadığınızı varsayıyorum. Ancak takviyelerin ve akrabalarınızın akıbeti, beni ilgilendirdiği kadar sizi de ilgilendirmeli. İpuçları bulmaya çalışın: Karakola bakın, olan biteni de {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovlulara{/g} sorun. lafı dolandırmayacağım. Şu anda bahane üretip durmak yerine bir işe yaramanız gerek."

languages.text: «Eso es una lástima». {n}Sus cejas se unen cuando las frunce.{/n} «Es una lástima que, hasta ahora, hayamos tenido que depender de las fuerzas de los Drivestem. Según su limitada información, he de suponer que no lideraba las tropas, pero el estado de los refuerzos y sus parientes debería preocuparle tanto como a mí. Busque cualquier pista: compruebe el puesto avanzado y pregunte a los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g}. Le seré franca: ahora mismo, verá que resultar útil le hará más favores que ninguna excusa».
languages.original_text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

traits.locale_text: «Eso es una lástima». {n}Sus cejas se unen cuando las frunce.{/n} «Es una lástima que, hasta ahora, hayamos tenido que depender de las fuerzas de los Drivestem. Según su limitada información, he de suponer que no lideraba las tropas, pero el estado de los refuerzos y sus parientes debería preocuparle tanto como a mí. Busque cualquier pista: compruebe el puesto avanzado y pregunte a los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g}. Le seré franca: ahora mismo, verá que resultar útil le hará más favores que ninguna excusa».

languages.text: "Das ist unerfreulich. {n}Sie kneift stirnrunzelnd die Augen zusammen.{/n} "Unerfreulich deshalb, weil wir bis dato gezwungen waren, uns auf die Truppen der Drivestems zu verlassen. Basierend auf Euren dürftigen Informationen gehe ich davon aus, dass Ihr die Truppen nicht angeführt habt. Aber das Schicksal der Verstärkung und Eurer Leute dürfte Euch ebenso interessieren wie mich. Sucht nach Hinweisen: Überprüft den Außenposten und befragt die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g}. Ich will ganz offen sein: Im Moment ist es wichtiger, Euch nützlich zu machen, als Euch zu entschuldigen.
languages.original_text: "That is unfortunate." {n}Her eyebrows knit together as she frowns.{/n} "Unfortunate that, thus far, we have been forced to rely on the Drivestems' forces. Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me. Look for any clues: check the outpost and ask the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g}. I will speak plainly: right now, making yourself useful is more important than making excuses."

Basierend auf Euren dürftigen Informationen gehe ich davon aus, dass Ihr die Truppen nicht angeführt habt. Aber das Schicksal der Verstärkung und Eurer Leute dürfte Euch ebenso interessieren wie mich. Sucht nach Hinweisen: Überprüft den Außenposten und befragt die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g}. Ich will ganz offen sein: Im Moment ist es wichtiger, Euch nützlich zu machen, als Euch zu entschuldigen.

languages.text: 「それは残念だ」{n}彼女は眉をひそめながら言った。{/n}「残念なのは、これまで我々はドライブステムの軍勢に頼らざるをえなかったことだ。君が率いていたわけではないと推測するが、補給隊や君の親族の運命は、私と同じように君にとっても重大な問題だ。何か手がかりを探せ。要塞を調べ、{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メロヴィアン{/g}に尋ねろ。はっきり言おう、今は言い訳をするよりも、役に立つことをする方が重要だ。」

Based on your meagre information, I assume you were not the one leading the troops. But the fate of the reinforcements and your kinsmen should concern you as much as it does me.
